report.summary: Convergence Day community cycle: Drafted 5 tweets (#173-177) covering $14.16B options expiry aftermath, SEC 91 ETF ruling, extreme fear signal (F&G 13, 48-day streak), new loan calculator tools, and post-expiry volatility watch. Created Discord/TG convergence recap and Newsletter v29 section. New SVG social card: Convergence Day (1200x630 with BTC price, options, SEC ETF, fear gauge, inflow cards). Content calendar extended through Tue Apr 1.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #173: Convergence Day Recap thread (4 parts) — $14.16B options settled, BTC at $67,896 (-5.5%), $7K below max pain, SEC 91 ETF deadline, F&G 13 contrarian signal. Scheduled: Fri Mar 27, 2PM ET.
Tweet #174: SEC 91 ETF Ruling breakdown — 24 tokens, 16 classified as commodities, XRP $1.44B pre-inflows, SOL $111M weekly inflows. Scheduled: Fri Mar 27, 4PM ET.
Tweet #175: Extreme Fear Signal — F&G 13, 48-day streak, historical sub-15 returns (+38.4% median 90d). Scheduled: Fri Mar 27, 6PM ET.
Tweet #176: New Tools spotlight — Crypto Loan Calculator, LTV Calculator, Best Bitcoin/USA Exchanges. Scheduled: Sat Mar 28, 10AM ET.
Tweet #177: Post-Expiry Volatility Watch — 48-72h compression, gamma unwind, key levels $66K-$70K. Scheduled: Sat Mar 28, 2PM ET.
Discord/TG: Convergence Day Recap — Full breakdown with market snapshot, options data, SEC ETF context, tool links. Posted: Fri Mar 27.
Newsletter v29 Section: Post-Convergence Thursday — market pulse with $14.16B expiry + SEC ruling, 4 new tools, 2 featured reads, degen corner contrarian signal.
Content calendar maintained through Tue Apr 1 — 12 scheduled pieces across Twitter, Discord/TG, Email.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Convergence Day (1200x630) — Three glass-morphism metric cards (BTC $67,896 -5.5%, Options $14.16B settled, SEC 91 ETFs deadline). Fear gauge bar showing F&G at 13 with 48-day streak label. Two inflow cards (XRP $1.44B, SOL $111M). Bottom context strip with ETH $2,047, ETF flows -$171M, market cap $2.42T, 16 commodities classified, +38.4% contrarian signal. Brand gradient bars. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-27-social-card-convergence-day.svg
